sEn: Llama-Nemotron models achieve competitive reasoning with superior efficiency and open-source resources.
sZh: Llama-Nemotron 模型在推理能力上媲美顶尖模型，同时提供更优的推理效率和开源资源。
absEn: We introduce the Llama-Nemotron series of models, an open family of heterogeneous reasoning models that deliver exceptional reasoning capabilities, inference efficiency, and an open license for enterprise use. The family comes in three sizes -- Nano (8B), Super (49B), and Ultra (253B) -- and performs competitively with state-of-the-art reasoning models such as DeepSeek-R1 while offering superior inference throughput and memory efficiency. In this report, we discuss the training procedure for these models, which entails using neural architecture search from Llama 3 models for accelerated inference, knowledge distillation, and continued pretraining, followed by a reasoning-focused post-training stage consisting of two main parts: supervised fine-tuning and large scale reinforcement learning. Llama-Nemotron models are the first open-source models to support a dynamic reasoning toggle, allowing users to switch between standard chat and reasoning modes during inference. To further support open research and facilitate model development, we provide the following resources: 1. We release the Llama-Nemotron reasoning models -- LN-Nano, LN-Super, and LN-Ultra -- under the commercially permissive NVIDIA Open Model License Agreement. 2. We release the complete post-training dataset: Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset. 3. We also release our training codebases: NeMo, NeMo-Aligner, and Megatron-LM.
absZh: 我们推出了 Llama-Nemotron 系列模型，这是一个开放的异构推理模型家族，具备卓越的推理能力、推理效率，并采用适合企业使用的开放许可。该系列包含三种尺寸——Nano（8B）、Super（49B）和 Ultra（253B）——在与 DeepSeek-R1 等最先进的推理模型竞争的同时，提供了更优的推理吞吐量和内存效率。在本报告中，我们讨论了这些模型的训练流程，包括使用神经架构搜索从 Llama 3 模型加速推理、知识蒸馏和持续预训练，随后是专注于推理的后训练阶段，该阶段由两个主要部分组成：监督微调和大规模强化学习。Llama-Nemotron 模型是首批支持动态推理切换的开源模型，允许用户在推理过程中在标准聊天模式和推理模式之间切换。为了进一步支持开放研究和促进模型开发，我们提供了以下资源：1. 我们根据商业许可的 NVIDIA 开放模型许可协议发布了 Llama-Nemotron 推理模型——LN-Nano、LN-Super 和 LN-Ultra。2. 我们发布了完整的后训练数据集：Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset。3. 我们还发布了我们的训练代码库：NeMo、NeMo-Aligner 和 Megatron-LM。

contrib.en: Introduces Llama-Nemotron, an open family of heterogeneous reasoning models with three sizes (8B, 49B, 253B).
contrib.zh: 提出 Llama-Nemotron，一个开放的非同构推理模型系列，包含三种规模（8B、49B、253B）。

contrib.en: Achieves competitive reasoning performance with state-of-the-art models while offering superior inference throughput and memory efficiency.
contrib.zh: 在推理性能上与最先进模型竞争，同时提供更优的推理吞吐量和内存效率。

contrib.en: First open-source models to support a dynamic reasoning toggle for switching between standard chat and reasoning modes.
contrib.zh: 首个支持动态推理切换的开源模型，可在标准聊天和推理模式间切换。

contrib.en: Releases complete post-training dataset, training codebases (NeMo, NeMo-Aligner, Megatron-LM), and model weights under permissive license.
contrib.zh: 在宽松许可下发布完整的后训练数据集、训练代码库（NeMo、NeMo-Aligner、Megatron-LM）和模型权重。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that large-scale curriculum-driven reinforcement learning enables student models to surpass teacher performance.
contrib.zh: 证明大规模课程驱动的强化学习使学生模型能够超越教师模型的性能。

contrib.en: Shows strong generalization on out-of-distribution tasks like LLM-as-a-Judge, outperforming many proprietary and open-source models.
contrib.zh: 在 LLM 作为评判者等分布外任务上表现出强泛化能力，超越许多专有和开源模型。

limits.en: Reinforcement learning yields suboptimal results for smaller models compared to distillation.
limits.zh: 对于较小模型，强化学习相比蒸馏效果欠佳。

limits.en: Training instability (gradient explosions) observed during RL for LN-Ultra, requiring resumption with reinitialized optimizer states.
limits.zh: LN-Ultra 的强化学习训练中出现不稳定性（梯度爆炸），需重新初始化优化器状态后恢复训练。

limits.en: Evaluation on reasoning-heavy tasks like AIME exhibits high variance due to small dataset size and generation randomness.
limits.zh: 在 AIME 等推理密集型任务上的评估因数据集小和生成随机性而呈现高方差。

limits.en: SFT alone sets an upper bound on student performance; RL is necessary to surpass teacher but resource-intensive.
limits.zh: 仅靠 SFT 会限制学生模型性能上限；超越教师需要 RL，但资源消耗大。

limits.en: Models are optimized for specific hardware (H100 GPUs); performance on other hardware may vary.
limits.zh: 模型针对特定硬件（H100 GPU）优化；在其他硬件上的性能可能有所不同。

items.en: We introduce the Llama-Nemotron series of models, an open family of heterogeneous reasoning models that deliver exceptional reasoning capabilities, inference efficiency, and an open license for enterprise use. The family comes in three sizes—Nano (8B), Super (49B), and Ultra (253B)— and performs competitively with state of the art reasoning models such as DeepSeek-R1 while offering superior inference throughput and memory efficiency. In this report, we discuss the training procedure for these models, which entails using neural architecture search from Llama 3 models for accelerated inference, knowledge distillation, and continued pretraining, followed by a reasoning-focused post-training stage consisting of two main parts: supervised fine-tuning and large scale reinforcement learning. Llama-Nemotron models are the first open-source models to support a dynamic reasoning toggle, allowing users to switch between standard chat and reasoning modes during inference. To further support open research and facilitate model development:
items.zh: 我们介绍了Llama-Nemotron系列模型，这是一个开放的非同构推理模型家族，具有卓越的推理能力、推理效率，并提供适用于企业使用的开放许可。该系列包含三种规模——Nano（8B）、Super（49B）和Ultra（253B）——在与DeepSeek-R1等最先进的推理模型竞争的同时，提供了更优的推理吞吐量和内存效率。在本报告中，我们讨论了这些模型的训练流程，包括使用来自Llama 3模型的神经架构搜索以加速推理、知识蒸馏和继续预训练，随后是一个以推理为中心的后训练阶段，包含两个主要部分：监督微调和大规模强化学习。Llama-Nemotron模型是首批支持动态推理切换的开源模型，允许用户在推理过程中在标准聊天模式和推理模式之间切换。为了进一步支持开放研究和促进模型开发：

items.en: We release the Llama-Nemotron reasoning models—LN-Nano, LN-Super, and LN-Ultra—under the commercially permissive NVIDIA Open Model License Agreement.
items.zh: 我们以商业友好的NVIDIA开放模型许可协议发布了Llama-Nemotron推理模型——LN-Nano、LN-Super和LN-Ultra。

items.en: We release the complete post-training dataset.
items.zh: 我们发布了完整的后训练数据集。

items.en: We also release our training codebases: NeMo, NeMo-Aligner, Megatron-LM.
items.zh: 我们还发布了我们的训练代码库：NeMo、NeMo-Aligner、Megatron-LM。

items.capEn: Figure 1: As of April 2025, our flagship model LN-Ultra is the most “intelligent” open model according to Artificial Analysis.
items.capZh: 图1：截至2025年4月，根据Artificial Analysis，我们的旗舰模型LN-Ultra是最“智能”的开放模型。

items.capEn: Figure 2: LN-Ultra delivers leading performance among open models across a wide range of reasoning and non-reasoning benchmarks.
items.capZh: 图2：LN-Ultra在广泛的推理和非推理基准测试中，在开放模型中提供了领先的性能。

items.en: In recent years the pace of language model development has been increasing, leading to rapid improvements in performance across a wide range of natural language processing tasks. Most recently, the introduction of reasoning models such as OpenAI o1 (OpenAI, 2025) and DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025) has marked a new phase of advancement, resulting in models that can think deeply about problems before answering. A defining characteristic of these models is their long responses, often containing long chains of thought, self-verification, reflection, and backtracking. Such long responses enable them to achieve state-of-the-art performance across a wide variety of tasks, including PhD-level STEM questions and competition-level math problems.
items.zh: 近年来，语言模型的发展速度不断加快，导致在广泛自然语言处理任务上的性能快速提升。最近，OpenAI o1（OpenAI, 2025）和DeepSeek-R1（DeepSeek-AI等，2025）等推理模型的引入标志着一个新的进步阶段，这些模型在回答之前能够深入思考问题。这些模型的一个决定性特征是它们的长响应，通常包含长思维链、自我验证、反思和回溯。这种长响应使它们能够在各种任务上实现最先进的性能，包括博士级STEM问题和竞赛级数学问题。

items.en: As reasoning capabilities increasingly depend on scaling at inference time, it has become essential to design models that are efficient to run during inference. Inference efficiency is no longer just a deployment concern—it is now a core limiting factor for overall model intelligence and the viability of agentic pipelines. As such, maximizing inference efficiency is a primary optimization objective for these models. Beyond raw inference efficiency, it is equally critical to expose control over reasoning behavior to the end user. Not all queries benefit from detailed multi-step reasoning—such responses may be unnecessarily verbose or even counterproductive in certain contexts. Granting users the ability to toggle reasoning on or off ensures that inference resources are allocated judiciously and that response styles remain appropriate to the task (Anthropic, 2025).
items.zh: 随着推理能力越来越依赖于推理时的Scaling，设计在推理时高效运行的模型变得至关重要。推理效率不再仅仅是部署问题——它现在是整体模型智能和智能体式流水线可行性的核心限制因素。因此，最大化推理效率是这些模型的主要优化目标。除了原始推理效率，向最终用户暴露对推理行为的控制同样关键。并非所有查询都受益于详细的多步推理——在某些情况下，这样的响应可能不必要地冗长甚至适得其反。赋予用户切换推理的能力可以确保推理资源得到明智分配，并且响应风格保持适合任务（Anthropic, 2025）。

items.en: In this paper, we detail the training of the Llama-Nemotron (LN) family of models, an open family of heterogeneous reasoning models that deliver exceptional reasoning capabilities, inference efficiency, and an open license for enterprise use. The models come in three sizes— LN-Nano (8B), LN-Super (49B), and LN-Ultra (253B). Notably, LN-Ultra outperforms DeepSeek-R1 while fitting on a single 8xH100 node and achieving higher inference throughput. These models are derived from Llama 3.1 and Llama 3.3 (Grattafiori et al., 2024), and are optimized for high-throughput inference while delivering strong reasoning performance and a context length of 128K tokens. Each model supports a reasoning toggle that lets users dynamically switch between standard chat and reasoning modes at inference time using a lightweight system prompt: "detailed thinking on/off". This design enables both cost-effective general-purpose use and detailed multi-step reasoning, without requiring separate models or architectures.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们详细介绍了Llama-Nemotron（LN）模型家族的训练，这是一个开放的非同构推理模型家族，具有卓越的推理能力、推理效率，并提供适用于企业使用的开放许可。模型有三种规模——LN-Nano（8B）、LN-Super（49B）和LN-Ultra（253B）。值得注意的是，LN-Ultra在单个8xH100节点上运行且推理吞吐量更高的情况下，性能优于DeepSeek-R1。这些模型源自Llama 3.1和Llama 3.3（Grattafiori等，2024），并针对高吞吐量推理进行了优化，同时提供强大的推理性能和128K令牌的上下文长度。每个模型都支持一个推理切换，允许用户在推理时通过轻量级系统提示“详细思考开/关”在标准聊天模式和推理模式之间动态切换。这种设计实现了成本效益高的通用用途和详细的多步推理，无需单独的模型或架构。

items.en: The Llama-Nemotron models are constructed in five stages. The first stage consists of optimizing inference efficiency with neural architecture search (NAS) from the Llama 3 series of models and applying Feed-Forward Network (FFN) Fusion. The second stage includes recovery training with knowledge distillation and continued pretraining. The third stage is supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on a mix of standard instruction data and reasoning traces from strong teachers such as DeepSeek-R1, which enables the model to perform multi-step reasoning. The fourth stage involves large-scale reinforcement learning on complex mathematics and STEM datasets, a crucial step for enabling the student model to surpass its teacher’s capabilities. For LN-Ultra, this phase yields a substantial performance boost on the GPQA-D benchmark, cementing it as the best open-source model for scientific reasoning. To enable such large-scale RL training, we develop a custom training framework that contains a number of optimizations, most notably generation in FP8. The final stage is a short alignment phase focused on instruction following and human preference.
items.zh: Llama-Nemotron模型通过五个阶段构建。第一阶段包括使用来自Llama 3系列模型的神经架构搜索（NAS）优化推理效率，并应用前馈网络（FFN）融合。第二阶段包括使用知识蒸馏和继续预训练进行恢复训练。第三阶段是在标准指令数据和来自强教师（如DeepSeek-R1）的推理轨迹混合数据上进行监督微调（SFT），使模型能够执行多步推理。第四阶段涉及在复杂数学和STEM数据集上进行大规模强化学习，这是使学生模型超越其教师能力的关键步骤。对于LN-Ultra，这一阶段在GPQA-D基准测试上带来了显著的性能提升，使其成为科学推理方面最好的开源模型。为了实现如此大规模的RL训练，我们开发了一个自定义训练框架，包含许多优化，最显著的是FP8生成。最后阶段是一个简短的对齐阶段，侧重于指令遵循和人类偏好。

items.en: As part of this release, we also open-source the Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset, a carefully curated dataset used during the supervised and reinforcement learning stages of training for LN-Nano, LN-Super, and LN-Ultra. It is designed to target key capabilities such as mathematical reasoning, coding, science, and instruction following, and consists of synthetic responses generated by a range of open-source models. Prompts and responses are filtered for quality, correctness, and complexity to provide strong training signals across a diverse set of tasks.
items.zh: 作为此次发布的一部分，我们还开源了Llama-Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset，这是一个精心策划的数据集，用于LN-Nano、LN-Super和LN-Ultra训练中的监督和强化学习阶段。它旨在针对关键能力，如数学推理、编码、科学和指令遵循，并由一系列开源模型生成的合成响应组成。提示和响应经过质量、正确性和复杂性过滤，以在多样化任务集上提供强大的训练信号。

items.en: According to Artificial Analysis (shown in Figure 1), an independent benchmarking and analysis company focused on evaluating artificial intelligence models and API providers, LN-Ultra is the most intelligent open-sourced model as of April 2025. This release represents one of the largest contributions to the open source community in support of developing reasoning models.
items.zh: 根据Artificial Analysis（如图1所示），一家专注于评估人工智能模型和API提供商的独立基准测试和分析公司，截至2025年4月，LN-Ultra是最智能的开源模型。此次发布代表了开源社区在支持推理模型开发方面最大的贡献之一。

items.en: The LN-Super and LN-Ultra models are optimized for efficient inference using the Puzzle framework (Bercovich et al., 2024). Puzzle is a neural architecture search (NAS) framework that transforms large language models into hardware-efficient variants under real-world deployment constraints, as illustrated in Figure 3. Starting from a Llama 3 Instruct model (Llama 3.3-70B-Instruct for LN-Super and Llama 3.1-405B-Instruct for LN-Ultra), Puzzle applies block-wise local distillation to build a library of alternative transformer blocks. Each block is trained independently and in parallel to approximate the function of its parent block while improving computational properties such as latency, memory usage, or throughput. This process allows each alternative block to approximate the original behavior with a certain accuracy-efficiency tradeoff profile; that is, some blocks in the library are more efficient but may incur some quality degradation—introducing an explicit tradeoff between computational cost and model accuracy. The block variants include:
items.zh: LN-Super和LN-Ultra模型使用Puzzle框架（Bercovich等，2024）优化了高效推理。Puzzle是一个神经架构搜索（NAS）框架，将大型语言模型转换为实际部署约束下的硬件高效变体，如图3所示。从Llama 3 Instruct模型（LN-Super使用Llama 3.3-70B-Instruct，LN-Ultra使用Llama 3.1-405B-Instruct）开始，Puzzle应用块级局部蒸馏来构建替代Transformer块的库。每个块独立并行训练，以近似其父块的功能，同时改善计算属性，如延迟、内存使用或吞吐量。这个过程允许每个替代块以一定的精度-效率权衡曲线近似原始行为；也就是说，库中的某些块更高效，但可能会带来一些质量下降——在计算成本和模型精度之间引入明确的权衡。块变体包括：

items.en: Attention removal: Some blocks omit the attention mechanism entirely, reducing both compute and KV-cache memory consumption.
items.zh: 注意力移除：一些块完全省略了注意力机制，减少了计算和KV缓存内存消耗。

items.en: Variable FFN dimensions: The feed-forward network’s intermediate size is varied, enabling compression at different granularity levels (e.g., 87%, 75%, 50%, down to 10% of the original hidden size).
items.zh: 可变FFN维度：前馈网络的中间大小变化，允许在不同粒度级别进行压缩（例如，原始隐藏大小的87%、75%、50%，低至10%）。

items.en: While Puzzle supports additional operations—including grouped-query attention (GQA) (Ainslie et al., 2023) with different numbers of key-value heads, linear alternatives to attention, and no-op substitutions—empirical evaluation showed that attention removal and FFN compression were the most effective for optimizing the LN-Super and LN-Ultra models in terms of overall throughput and memory savings.
items.zh: 虽然Puzzle支持额外的操作——包括具有不同数量键值头的分组查询注意力（GQA）（Ainslie等，2023）、注意力的线性替代方案和无操作替换——但经验评估表明，在优化LN-Super和LN-Ultra模型时，注意力移除和FFN压缩在整体吞吐量和内存节省方面最为有效。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Overview of the Puzzle framework.

items.en: Once the block library is built, Puzzle assembles a complete model by selecting one block per layer. This selection is governed by a mixed-integer programming (MIP) solver that identifies the most efficient configuration under a given set of constraints, such as hardware compatibility, maximum allowed latency, total memory budget, or desired inference throughput. Because Puzzle supports multiple block variants per layer with different accuracy-efficiency tradeoff profiles, it enables users to precisely target any point on the accuracy-efficiency Pareto frontier. For example, Puzzle can generate models that meet specific constraints relevant to agentic systems or deployment pipelines – such as bounded memory use or tight end-to-end response time.
items.zh: 一旦构建了块库，Puzzle通过每层选择一个块来组装完整模型。这一选择由混合整数规划（MIP）求解器控制，该求解器在给定一组约束（如硬件兼容性、最大允许延迟、总内存预算或期望推理吞吐量）下识别最有效的配置。由于Puzzle每层支持多个具有不同精度-效率权衡曲线的块变体，它使用户能够精确瞄准精度-效率帕累托前沿上的任何点。例如，Puzzle可以生成满足与智能体系统或部署流水线相关的特定约束的模型——例如有界内存使用或严格的端到端响应时间。

items.en: For the LN-Ultra model, we introduce an additional compression technique called FFN Fusion (Bercovich et al., 2025), designed to reduce sequential depth and improve inference latency. This technique leverages a structural property that emerges after Puzzle removes some attention layers: the model often contains consecutive FFN blocks. FFN Fusion identifies such sequences and replaces them with fewer, wider FFN layers that can be executed in parallel. This reduces the number of sequential steps without compromising expressivity, and significantly improves compute utilization—especially on multi-GPU setups where inter-layer communication overhead is non-negligible.
items.zh: 对于LN-Ultra模型，我们引入了一种额外的压缩技术，称为FFN融合（Bercovich等，2025），旨在减少顺序深度并改善推理延迟。该技术利用了Puzzle移除一些注意力层后出现的结构特性：模型通常包含连续的FFN块。FFN融合识别这样的序列，并用更少、更宽的FFN层替换它们，这些层可以并行执行。这减少了顺序步骤的数量而不牺牲表达能力，并显著提高了计算利用率——尤其是在多GPU设置中，层间通信开销不可忽略。

items.en: is optimized to run efficiently on a single NVIDIA H100 GPU with tensor parallelism 1 (TP1). Using Puzzle, we produce a model that achieves a 5×5\times throughput speedup over Llama 3.3-70B-Instruct at batch size 256 and TP1. With one H100 GPU, even when Llama 3.3-70B-Instruct is run at its optimal configuration with TP4, LN-Super at TP1 still delivers a ≥\geq2.17×\times throughput advantage. The model is also optimized under a constraint of approximately 300K cached tokens (batch size ×\times sequence length), measured at FP8 precision on a single H100 GPU. For instance, this corresponds to processing batch size 16 and sequence length 18,750.
items.zh: 经过优化，可在单个NVIDIA H100 GPU上高效运行，张量并行度为1（TP1）。使用Puzzle，我们生成的模型在批量大小为256和TP1时，吞吐量比Llama 3.3-70B-Instruct提升5倍。即使Llama 3.3-70B-Instruct在其最佳配置TP4下运行，LN-Super在TP1下仍提供≥2.17倍的吞吐量优势。该模型还在约300K缓存令牌（批量大小×序列长度）的约束下进行了优化，在单个H100 GPU上以FP8精度测量。例如，这对应于处理批量大小16和序列长度18,750。

items.en: is optimized for a full H100 node (8 GPUs). During Puzzle’s architecture search phase, the model is constrained to achieve at least a 1.5×\times latency reduction over Llama 3.1-405B-Instruct. After applying FFN Fusion, the final model achieves a 1.71×\times latency improvement. LN-Ultra is also optimized under cached tokens constraints, supporting up to 3M tokens at FP8 precision and 600K tokens at BF16 precision on an H100 node.
items.zh: 针对完整的 H100 节点（8 个 GPU）进行了优化。在 Puzzle 的架构搜索阶段，模型被约束为至少实现相对于 Llama 3.1-405B-Instruct 的 1.5 倍延迟降低。应用 FFN Fusion 后，最终模型实现了 1.71 倍的延迟改进。LN-Ultra 也在缓存令牌约束下进行了优化，在 H100 节点上支持 FP8 精度下最多 300 万个令牌和 BF16 精度下 60 万个令牌。

items.capEn: Figure 4: GPQA-Diamond Accuracy vs. Throughput. We measure on two settings, S1: 500/2000 (ISL/OSL); S2: 5000/500 (ISL/OSL). Both with 250 concurrent users. Models are served with FP8. Note that we use 8×\timesH100 for LN-Ultra and Llama 3.1 405B, but 8×\timesH200 for Deepseek-R1 because of its size.
items.capZh: 图 4：GPQA-Diamond 准确率与吞吐量。我们在两种设置下进行测量，S1：500/2000（输入序列长度/输出序列长度）；S2：5000/500（输入序列长度/输出序列长度）。两者均有 250 个并发用户。模型以 FP8 提供服务。请注意，我们对 LN-Ultra 和 Llama 3.1 405B 使用 8×H100，但由于 Deepseek-R1 的规模，对其使用 8×H200。

full.sec: 2.2 Post-NAS Training: Knowledge Distillation and Continued Pretraining
full.secZh: 2.2 后NAS训练：知识蒸馏与持续预训练

items.en: Following the NAS phase, both LN-Super and LN-Ultra undergo additional training to improve inter-block compatibility and recover any quality loss introduced during blockwise substitution.
items.zh: 在 NAS 阶段之后，LN-Super 和 LN-Ultra 都经过额外训练，以改善块间兼容性并恢复块级替换过程中引入的任何质量损失。

items.en: LN-Super is trained for 40B tokens using a knowledge distillation objective over the Distillation Mix dataset introduced by Bercovich et al. (2024).
items.zh: LN-Super 使用知识蒸馏目标在 Bercovich 等人（2024）引入的 Distillation Mix 数据集上训练了 400 亿个令牌。

items.en: LN-Ultra is first trained with knowledge distillation for 65B tokens using the same distillation dataset, followed by 88B tokens of continued training on the Nemotron-H phase 4 pretraining dataset (NVIDIA et al., 2025).
items.zh: LN-Ultra 首先使用相同的蒸馏数据集进行知识蒸馏训练 650 亿个令牌，然后在 Nemotron-H 阶段 4 预训练数据集（NVIDIA 等人，2025）上进行 880 亿个令牌的持续训练。

items.en: This final pretraining step allows LN-Ultra to not only match but surpass the reference model Llama 3.1-405B-Instruct in key benchmarks, demonstrating that aggressive architecture optimization can be reconciled with high model performance through short distillation and pretraining (see Table 1).
items.zh: 这最后的预训练步骤使 LN-Ultra 不仅能够匹配，而且能够在关键基准测试中超越参考模型 Llama 3.1-405B-Instruct，表明通过短时间蒸馏和预训练，激进的架构优化可以与高模型性能相协调（见表 1）。

items.en: We curate both reasoning and non-reasoning data for supervised fine-tuning. For reasoning samples, we include the system instruction "detailed thinking on", and for non-reasoning samples, we use "detailed thinking off". This setup allows the model to learn to toggle reasoning behavior at inference time based on the prompt. Below, we describe our focused data curation process for each mode.
items.zh: 我们为监督微调整理了推理和非推理数据。对于推理样本，我们包含系统指令“detailed thinking on”，对于非推理样本，我们使用“detailed thinking off”。这种设置允许模型学习在推理时根据提示切换推理行为。下面，我们描述每种模式的专注数据整理过程。

items.en: To construct the math reasoning portion of our data we used a pipeline described by Moshkov et al. (2025). A high-level overview of this pipeline is provided below, with full details available in the original publication.
items.zh: 为了构建数学推理部分的数据，我们使用了 Moshkov 等人（2025）描述的流程。下面提供该流程的高级概述，完整细节可在原始出版物中找到。

items.en: We collect a large set of mathematical problems from Art of Problem Solving (AoPS) community forums. We include all forum discussions except “Middle School Math” which was found to be too easy and unhelpful for training in our early experiments. After retrieving forum discussions we perform the following steps to extract problems and synthesize new solutions. We use Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct (Qwen, 2024) for all steps in the pipeline unless noted otherwise.
items.zh: 我们从 Art of Problem Solving (AoPS) 社区论坛收集了大量数学问题。我们包括所有论坛讨论，但“中学数学”除外，因为在我们早期的实验中，它被认为太容易且对训练无帮助。检索论坛讨论后，我们执行以下步骤来提取问题并合成新解决方案。除非另有说明，我们在流程的所有步骤中使用 Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct（Qwen，2024）。

items.en: We prompt an LLM to identify and extract all problems from the initial forum posts. While most posts contain a single problem, some include multiple problems or none at all.
items.zh: 我们提示 LLM 从初始论坛帖子中识别并提取所有问题。虽然大多数帖子包含单个问题，但有些包含多个问题或根本没有问题。

items.en: Each extracted problem is classified into the following categories:
items.zh: 每个提取的问题被分类为以下类别：

items.en: Binary question (yes-or-no answer) or not
items.zh: 二元问题（是或否答案）或非二元问题

items.en: Valid problem or not. For example, problems that are lacking context or referring to other problems are considered invalid.
items.zh: 有效问题或无效问题。例如，缺乏上下文或引用其他问题的问题被视为无效。

items.en: We remove all proof problems, multiple-choice questions, binary questions, and invalid problems from the final dataset.
items.zh: 我们从最终数据集中删除所有证明问题、多项选择题、二元问题和无效问题。

items.en: We extract the final answer from forum discussions, without attempting to extract full solutions. Only the final answer expression is extracted to enable automatic correctness checking.
items.zh: 我们从论坛讨论中提取最终答案，而不尝试提取完整解决方案。仅提取最终答案表达式以实现自动正确性检查。

items.en: Following Yang et al. (2023) we use an LLM-based comparison to remove questions that closely resemble those in popular math benchmarks.
items.zh: 遵循 Yang 等人（2023）的方法，我们使用基于 LLM 的比较来删除与流行数学基准中问题高度相似的问题。

items.en: We prompt DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025) and Qwen2.5-Math-7B-Instruct (Qwen, 2024) to solve each problem multiple times producing “reasoning” and “non-reasoning” solutions respectively. We use 16 generations per problem for DeepSeek-R1 and 64 generations per problem for Qwen2.5-Math-7B-Instruct.
items.zh: 我们提示 DeepSeek-R1（DeepSeek-AI 等人，2025）和 Qwen2.5-Math-7B-Instruct（Qwen，2024）多次解决每个问题，分别生成“推理”和“非推理”解决方案。对于 DeepSeek-R1，每个问题使用 16 次生成；对于 Qwen2.5-Math-7B-Instruct，每个问题使用 64 次生成。

items.en: As the final filtering step, we remove any solutions that do not reach the expected answer. Predicted and expected answers are compared by prompting Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct (Qwen, 2024) to judge their equivalence in the context of the problem. For problems where the final answer cannot be extracted, we treat the most common answer across all available solution candidates as the ground truth.
items.zh: 作为最终过滤步骤，我们删除任何未达到预期答案的解决方案。通过提示 Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct（Qwen，2024）在问题上下文中判断预测答案和预期答案的等价性来进行比较。对于无法提取最终答案的问题，我们将所有可用解决方案候选中最常见的答案视为真实答案。

items.en: All prompts and scripts necessary to run the above pipeline are available in NeMo-Skills.
items.zh: 运行上述流程所需的所有提示和脚本均可在 NeMo-Skills 中获得。

items.en: The code reasoning dataset is constructed via a multi-stage process involving question collection, solution generation, and post-processing steps, as described by Ahmad et al. (2025).
items.zh: 代码推理数据集通过多阶段流程构建，包括问题收集、解决方案生成和后处理步骤，如 Ahmad 等人（2025）所述。

items.en: We aggregate 28,904 unique competitive programming questions from diverse sources including TACO (Li et al., 2023), APPS (Hendrycks et al., 2021a), CodeContests (Li et al., 2022), and CodeForces (Penedo et al., 2025a), after performing exact-match deduplication. To ensure evaluation integrity against benchmarks like (Jain et al., 2025; Li et al., 2022; Chen et al., 2021; Austin et al., 2021), we rigorously check for contamination using the method from Yang et al. (2023). This involves cosine similarity checks and semantic evaluation by LLM judges (Llama-3.3-70B (Grattafiori et al., 2024), Qwen2.5-32B (Qwen, 2024)). Manual verification confirms negligible overlap (<0.3%<0.3\%), validating the question set.
items.zh: 我们从包括 TACO (Li et al., 2023)、APPS (Hendrycks et al., 2021a)、CodeContests (Li et al., 2022) 和 CodeForces (Penedo et al., 2025a) 在内的多种来源中，经过精确匹配去重后，汇总了 28,904 道独特的竞赛编程问题。为确保评估的完整性，针对 (Jain et al., 2025; Li et al., 2022; Chen et al., 2021; Austin et al., 2021) 等基准，我们使用 Yang et al. (2023) 的方法严格检查污染情况。这包括余弦相似度检查和 LLM 评判器（Llama-3.3-70B (Grattafiori et al., 2024)、Qwen2.5-32B (Qwen, 2024)）的语义评估。人工验证确认重叠可忽略不计（<0.3%），从而验证了问题集的有效性。

items.en: We employ DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025) to generate multiple solutions per question, primarily in Python, with C++ solutions also generated for specific benchmark testing (Penedo et al., 2025b). Solutions are generated using Nucleus Sampling (Holtzman et al., 2020) (temperature 0.6, top-p 0.95) via SGLang (Zheng et al., 2024), explicitly prompting for reasoning steps enclosed in <think> tags.
items.zh: 我们使用 DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025) 为每个问题生成多个解决方案，主要使用 Python，同时也为特定基准测试生成 C++ 解决方案 (Penedo et al., 2025b)。解决方案通过 Nucleus Sampling (Holtzman et al., 2020)（温度 0.6，top-p 0.95）使用 SGLang (Zheng et al., 2024) 生成，并明确提示将推理步骤包含在 <think> 标签中。

items.en: We refine generated responses by verifying the presence of reasoning traces, extracting solution code segments (demarcated by python...), removing samples with code inside reasoning tags, and validating syntax using Tree Sitter (TreeSitter, 2013). This process yields approximately 488K Python samples.
items.zh: 我们通过验证推理轨迹的存在、提取解决方案代码段（由 python... 界定）、移除推理标签内包含代码的样本以及使用 Tree Sitter (TreeSitter, 2013) 验证语法来精炼生成的响应。此过程产生约 488K 个 Python 样本。

items.en: While some studies suggest small datasets suffice for inducing reasoning (HuggingFace, 2025; Muennighoff et al., 2025; BespokeLabs, 2025; OpenThoughts, 2025), especially in mathematics, our experiments indicate large-scale data is crucial for high performance on coding benchmarks. An ablation study scaling the dataset from 25k to 736k samples showed continuous improvement. Initial scaling (25k-100k) provides gains, but focusing generation on harder problems from CodeContests before expanding to the full question set yields the most significant performance boosts. The scaling curve does not plateau, emphasizing the importance of large, diverse, and challenging problem sets for advancing code generation capabilities, suggesting a need for methods to create or source more difficult problems at scale.
items.zh: 虽然一些研究表明小数据集足以诱导推理 (HuggingFace, 2025; Muennighoff et al., 2025; BespokeLabs, 2025; OpenThoughts, 2025)，尤其是在数学领域，但我们的实验表明，大规模数据对于在编程基准上获得高性能至关重要。一项将数据集从 25k 扩展到 736k 样本的消融研究显示了持续改进。初始扩展（25k-100k）带来了收益，但在扩展到完整问题集之前，专注于从 CodeContests 生成更困难的问题，能带来最显著的性能提升。扩展曲线没有趋于平稳，强调了大规模、多样化和具有挑战性的问题集对于提升代码生成能力的重要性，表明需要创建或获取大规模更困难问题的方法。

items.en: We curate a diverse set of open-ended and multiple-choice questions (MCQs) from both in-house and external sources. These include question-answer pairs extracted from StackOverflow (Stack Exchange Data, 2024) and synthetically generated MCQ questions.
items.zh: 我们策划了来自内部和外部来源的多样化开放性和多项选择题（MCQ）集。这些包括从 StackOverflow (Stack Exchange Data, 2024) 提取的问答对以及合成生成的 MCQ 问题。

items.en: To create synthetic questions, we define a broad set of academic topics (e.g., physics, biology, chemistry) and their subtopics using Nemotron-4-340B-Instruct (NVIDIA, 2024c). We specify multiple difficulty levels to ensure a diverse and scalable dataset. We prompt Qwen2.5 models (Qwen, 2024) to generate MCQs conditioned on the topic, subtopic, and difficulty level. Each question is verified for format compliance. Following the OpenMathInstruct-2 (Toshniwal et al., 2025) pipeline, we augment the dataset by prompting Qwen2.5 to generate variations of the original questions.
items.zh: 为了创建合成问题，我们使用 Nemotron-4-340B-Instruct (NVIDIA, 2024c) 定义了一组广泛的学术主题（例如物理、生物、化学）及其子主题。我们指定了多个难度级别，以确保数据集的多样性和可扩展性。我们提示 Qwen2.5 模型 (Qwen, 2024) 根据主题、子主题和难度级别生成 MCQ。每个问题都经过格式合规性验证。遵循 OpenMathInstruct-2 (Toshniwal et al., 2025) 流程，我们通过提示 Qwen2.5 生成原始问题的变体来扩充数据集。

items.en: To ensure fair evaluation, we perform decontamination on the entire set of questions—both real and synthetic—against the test sets of major science benchmarks such as GPQA (Rein et al., 2023), MMLU (Hendrycks et al., 2021b), and MMLU-Pro (Wang et al., 2024), following the approach outlined in Yang et al. (2023).
items.zh: 为了确保公平评估，我们对整个问题集（包括真实和合成问题）进行去污染处理，针对主要科学基准的测试集，如 GPQA (Rein et al., 2023)、MMLU (Hendrycks et al., 2021b) 和 MMLU-Pro (Wang et al., 2024)，遵循 Yang et al. (2023) 中概述的方法。

items.en: For all questions in the dataset, we use DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025) to generate multiple reasoning traces. For questions without ground-truth answers, we apply majority voting across generated solutions to infer the most likely correct answer.
items.zh: 对于数据集中的所有问题，我们使用 DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025) 生成多个推理轨迹。对于没有标准答案的问题，我们对生成的解决方案应用多数投票，以推断最可能的正确答案。

items.en: For general domain data, we follow the generation pipeline established in NVIDIA (2024c). We generate synthetic prompts covering various tasks such as open QA, closed QA, extraction, and brainstorming. We also source real-world user prompts from publicly available datasets with permissive licenses. For responses, we prompt DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025) for multiple generations and perform rejection sampling using the Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B reward model (NVIDIA, 2024b). This ensures that the responses are of high quality.
items.zh: 对于通用领域数据，我们遵循 NVIDIA (2024c) 中建立的生成流程。我们生成涵盖各种任务（如开放 QA、封闭 QA、提取和头脑风暴）的合成提示。我们还从具有宽松许可证的公开数据集中获取真实世界的用户提示。对于响应，我们提示 DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025) 进行多次生成，并使用 Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B 奖励模型 (NVIDIA, 2024b) 进行拒绝采样。这确保了响应的高质量。

items.en: To train the model to follow the reasoning toggle instruction, we construct paired data where each prompt has both a reasoning response and a non-reasoning response. Specifically, we randomly sample prompts from the reasoning dataset in Section 3.1 and generate corresponding non-reasoning responses using Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B-Instruct (NVIDIA, 2024a) for general domain prompts and Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct for others. Each response is tagged with the appropriate system instruction—“detailed thinking on” for reasoning and “detailed thinking off” for non-reasoning. This pairing enables the model to learn to modulate its reasoning behavior based on the system prompt.
items.zh: 为了训练模型遵循推理切换指令，我们构建了配对数据，其中每个提示既有推理响应也有非推理响应。具体来说，我们从第 3.1 节的推理数据集中随机采样提示，并使用 Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B-Instruct (NVIDIA, 2024a) 为通用领域提示生成相应的非推理响应，其他提示则使用 Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct。每个响应都标记有适当的系统指令——“detailed thinking on”用于推理，“detailed thinking off”用于非推理。这种配对使模型能够学习根据系统提示调节其推理行为。

items.en: Responses are then filtered according to ground truth answers or reward models. We also leverage public permissive datasets on function calling and safety, augmenting them to train the model and improve its capabilities in these areas. To further improve performance on general tasks, we use a feedback-edit system, described in Section 3.2.1.
items.zh: 然后根据标准答案或奖励模型对响应进行过滤。我们还利用关于函数调用和安全性的公开许可数据集，对其进行扩充以训练模型并提高其在这些领域的能力。为了进一步提高通用任务的性能，我们使用反馈编辑系统，如第 3.2.1 节所述。

items.en: To generate high-quality general-domain open-ended responses, we employ Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B-Instruct (NVIDIA, 2024a) in conjunction with a novel Feedback-Edit Inference-Time-Scaling system, described by Wang et al. (2025b). The process begins with 20k first-turn prompts sourced from ShareGPT (RyokoAI, 2023) and WildChat-1M (Zhao et al., 2024). We use Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B-Instruct to generate multiple initial responses for each prompt. These responses are refined through a three-stage process: a dedicated Feedback model identifies areas for improvement, a dedicated Edit model makes targeted edits based on the feedback, and a dedicated Select model chooses the best edited response. The resulting dataset comprises 20k first-turn prompts and their corresponding high-quality responses.
items.zh: 为了生成高质量的通用领域开放式响应，我们使用 Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B-Instruct (NVIDIA, 2024a) 结合一种新颖的反馈编辑推理时扩展系统，如 Wang et al. (2025b) 所述。该过程从来自 ShareGPT (RyokoAI, 2023) 和 WildChat-1M (Zhao et al., 2024) 的 20k 首轮提示开始。我们使用 Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B-Instruct 为每个提示生成多个初始响应。这些响应通过三个阶段进行精炼：专用的反馈模型识别改进领域，专用的编辑模型根据反馈进行有针对性的编辑，专用的选择模型选择最佳的编辑响应。生成的数据集包含 20k 首轮提示及其对应的高质量响应。

items.en: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) plays a critical role in transferring reasoning capabilities into the Llama-Nemotron models. While prior stages such as NAS and CPT focus on architectural efficiency and broad knowledge transfer, SFT helps distill reasoning behavior from strong teacher models like DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025) by training on task-specific reasoning traces. It also establishes fine-grained control over response style using the "detailed thinking on/off" instruction. Recent studies (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025; OpenThoughts, 2025; BespokeLabs, 2025; Wen et al., 2025) have shown that this reasoning SFT can substantially improve performance on complex reasoning tasks. Our results confirm these findings, highlighting the importance of training on large-scale, high-quality reasoning traces during SFT for eliciting robust reasoning abilities in downstream usage. This section builds upon the synthetic data described in Section 3 and provides further implementation details specific to each model.
items.zh: 监督微调（SFT）在将推理能力迁移到 Llama-Nemotron 模型中起着关键作用。虽然 NAS 和 CPT 等先前阶段侧重于架构效率和大规模知识迁移，但 SFT 通过训练任务特定的推理轨迹，帮助从强大的教师模型（如 DeepSeek-R1 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025)）中提炼推理行为。它还使用“detailed thinking on/off”指令建立对响应风格的细粒度控制。最近的研究 (DeepSeek-AI et al., 2025; OpenThoughts, 2025; BespokeLabs, 2025; Wen et al., 2025) 表明，这种推理 SFT 可以显著提高复杂推理任务的性能。我们的结果证实了这些发现，强调了在 SFT 期间在大规模、高质量的推理轨迹上进行训练对于在下游使用中激发稳健推理能力的重要性。本节基于第 3 节中描述的合成数据，并提供了每个模型特定的进一步实现细节。

items.en: All models are trained using a token-level cross-entropy loss over the instruction-tuning data. For most settings, training batches mix reasoning and non-reasoning data, where prompts are paired with responses conditioned on the respective system instruction— "detailed thinking on/off".
items.zh: 所有模型都使用指令微调数据上的 token 级交叉熵损失进行训练。对于大多数设置，训练批次混合了推理和非推理数据，其中提示与响应配对，并取决于相应的系统指令——“detailed thinking on/off”。

items.en: We observe that models require higher learning rates to effectively learn from long reasoning traces, especially due to sequence-length-dependent token loss averaging. Extended training over multiple epochs improves performance, particularly for smaller models, a trend also observed in prior work (Wen et al., 2025). We use Adam optimizer for training all models. Using a cosine learning rate decay with linear warmup to around 10% of total steps helps with stability of training, which was crucial for LN-Ultra.
items.zh: 我们观察到，模型需要更高的学习率才能有效学习长推理轨迹，特别是由于序列长度相关的 token 损失平均。在多个 epoch 上扩展训练可以提高性能，尤其是对于较小的模型，这一趋势也在先前的工作中观察到 (Wen et al., 2025)。我们使用 Adam 优化器训练所有模型。使用带有线性预热到总步数约 10% 的余弦学习率衰减有助于训练稳定性，这对 LN-Ultra 至关重要。

items.en: differently from other models below, undergoes a three-stage SFT pipeline using a global batch size of 256 using sequence packing with effective sequence length of 32k tokens. In the first stage, the model is fine-tuned exclusively on reasoning data from code, math, and science domains (Section 3.1) with a learning rate of 1​e−41\mathrm{e}{-4} for four epochs. This prevents failure modes such as repetitive completions. In the second stage, we introduce non-reasoning data (Section 3.2) mixed with reasoning samples, allowing the model to learn reasoning control. In the final stage, a smaller blend focused on chat, instruction-following, and tool-calling is used.
items.zh: 与其他模型不同，LN-Ultra 经历了一个三阶段 SFT 流程，使用全局批次大小 256，序列打包，有效序列长度为 32k token。在第一阶段，模型仅使用来自代码、数学和科学领域的推理数据（第 3.1 节）进行微调，学习率为 1e-4，训练四个 epoch。这可以防止重复完成等失败模式。在第二阶段，我们引入非推理数据（第 3.2 节）与推理样本混合，使模型能够学习推理控制。在最后阶段，使用更小的混合数据，侧重于聊天、指令遵循和工具调用。

items.en: is trained on the full SFT dataset for a single epoch using a fixed learning rate of 5​e−65\mathrm{e}{-6}, sequence length of 16k and a global batch size of 256. Smaller-scale runs suggested that performance improves up to 3–4 epochs with larger learning rates (5​e−55\mathrm{e}{-5}), but training was constrained by computational and time limits. Recent works (Wen et al., 2025) show that rejection fine-tuning can further improve performance; however, it does not yield gains in our experiments and is therefore omitted.
items.zh: LN-8B 在完整的 SFT 数据集上训练一个 epoch，使用固定学习率 5e-6，序列长度 16k，全局批次大小 256。小规模运行表明，使用更大的学习率（5e-5）训练 3-4 个 epoch 性能会提升，但训练受到计算和时间限制。最近的工作 (Wen et al., 2025) 表明拒绝微调可以进一步提高性能；然而，在我们的实验中它没有带来收益，因此被省略。

items.en: is trained on the full dataset using sequence packing with effective sequence length of 24k and a global batch size of 256 to maximize token throughput—an essential strategy when fine-tuning large models with long-context reasoning data. Initial ablation runs indicated that higher learning rates such as 5​e−55\mathrm{e}{-5} generally improve outcomes, but consistently high learning rates caused training instability, including gradient explosions. To mitigate this, we implement a linear warmup to 1​e−51\mathrm{e}{-5}, followed by cosine decay to 1​e−61\mathrm{e}{-6} with a warmup ratio of 10%. Despite these measures, training encountered gradient explosions and numerical instability after the first epoch. This required training resumption with reinitialized optimizer states, after which successful convergence was achieved.
items.zh: LN-70B 在完整数据集上训练，使用序列打包，有效序列长度 24k，全局批次大小 256，以最大化 token 吞吐量——这是微调具有长上下文推理数据的大模型时的关键策略。初始消融运行表明，更高的学习率如 5e-5 通常能改善结果，但持续的高学习率会导致训练不稳定，包括梯度爆炸。为了缓解这个问题，我们实现了线性预热到 1e-5，然后余弦衰减到 1e-6，预热比例为 10%。尽管采取了这些措施，训练在第一个 epoch 后遇到了梯度爆炸和数值不稳定性。这需要使用重新初始化的优化器状态恢复训练，之后成功收敛。

items.en: As described in Section 4 and illustrated in Table 5, models can acquire strong capabilities through supervised fine-tuning by distilling knowledge from powerful teachers. However, distillation inherently sets an upper bound on the student’s performance, particularly when the student’s base model is more capable than the teacher’s. Using supervised fine-tuning, LN-Ultra can approach the performance of DeepSeek-R1 but not exceed it. To enable student to surpass their teacher, large-scale reinforcement learning is an essential approach, as it allows the model to continually explore new possibilities and engage in self-learning. Consistent with the findings of DeepSeek-AI et al. (2025), our preliminary experiments indicate that reinforcement learning (RL) yields suboptimal results for smaller models compared to distillation. Given these observations and resource constraints, we apply reasoning RL exclusively to LN-Ultra, enabling it to surpass its teacher model and setting a new state-of-the-art on GPQA amoung open models.
items.zh: 如第 4 节所述并在表 5 中所示，模型可以通过监督微调从强大的教师模型中提炼知识来获得强大的能力。然而，蒸馏本质上限制了学生的性能上限，特别是当学生的基础模型比教师更强大时。使用监督微调，LN-Ultra 可以接近 DeepSeek-R1 的性能，但无法超越。为了让学生超越其教师，大规模强化学习是一种基本方法，因为它允许模型不断探索新的可能性并进行自我学习。与 DeepSeek-AI et al. (2025) 的发现一致，我们的初步实验表明，对于较小的模型，强化学习（RL）与蒸馏相比产生次优结果。鉴于这些观察和资源限制，我们仅将推理 RL 应用于 LN-Ultra，使其能够超越其教师模型，并在开放模型中在 GPQA 上树立新的最先进水平。

items.en: For LN-Ultra, we enhance the model’s scientific reasoning capabilities through large-scale reinforcement learning, leveraging the Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) algorithm (Shao et al., 2024). We use a rollout prompt size of 72 and sample 16 responses per prompt with t​e​m​p​e​r​a​t​u​r​e=1temperature=1 and t​o​p​_​p=1top\_p=1. During training, we set global batch size as 576 and conduct 2 gradient updates per rollout. We train our model until it achieves convergence on reasoning tasks. Figure 5 shows the accuracy score on GPQA-Diamond as our training progresses. With our optimized training infrastructure (see Section 5.2), the whole training takes approximately 140k H100 hours.
items.zh: 对于 LN-Ultra，我们通过大规模强化学习增强模型的科学推理能力，利用组相对策略优化（GRPO）算法 (Shao et al., 2024)。我们使用 rollout 提示大小 72，每个提示采样 16 个响应，温度=1，top_p=1。在训练期间，我们设置全局批次大小为 576，每次 rollout 进行 2 次梯度更新。我们训练模型直到其在推理任务上收敛。图 5 显示了随着训练进行，GPQA-Diamond 上的准确率得分。通过我们优化的训练基础设施（见第 5.2 节），整个训练大约需要 140k H100 小时。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Accuracy on GPQA-Diamond throughout the reasoning RL training for LN-Ultra
items.capZh: 图5：LN-Ultra在推理强化学习训练过程中GPQA-Diamond上的准确率

items.en: In this training phase, we leverage two types of rewards:
items.zh: 在此训练阶段，我们利用两种奖励：

items.en: Accuracy rewards: For each training example, a ground truth answer (a number, a sentence, or a paragraph) is provided. We serve the Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct model to judge whether the policy’s predictions match the ground truth answer.
items.zh: 准确率奖励：对于每个训练样本，提供真实答案（一个数字、一个句子或一个段落）。我们使用Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct模型判断策略的预测是否与真实答案匹配。

items.en: Format rewards: Following DeepSeek-AI et al. (2025), we employ a format reward to ensure the model puts its thinking process between "<think>" and "</think>" tags when using "detailed thinking on" mode. We also check for the non-existence of thinking tags when using "detailed thinking off" mode.
items.zh: 格式奖励：遵循DeepSeek-AI等人（2025），我们采用格式奖励，确保模型在使用“详细思考开启”模式时，将思考过程放在“<think>”和“</think>”标签之间。我们还检查在使用“详细思考关闭”模式时不存在思考标签。

items.en: To ensure that the model is adequately challenged, we preprocess the data by independently generating 8 responses per question using LN-Super, calculating the pass rate, and then intentionally discarding prompts with a pass rate of 0.75 or higher, thereby increasing the difficulty of the training data. Besides data filtering, we also find curriculum training to be helpful, as it allows the model to gradually learn from a progression of tasks with increasing difficulty. Specifically, we implement a progressive batching strategy leveraging pre-calculated pass rate as a difficulty metric. Given a fixed batch size, the core of our approach involves dynamically calculating a target distribution of pass rates for each sequential batch. This distribution is modeled using a Gaussian function centered on a difficulty level that progresses from high pass rates (easier examples) for initial batches to low pass rates (harder examples) for later batches. Samples are allocated to each batch primarily based on this target distribution, considering the available count for each pass rate, with any remaining batch capacity filled by prioritizing pass rates with the largest remaining sample pools. This ensures a controlled, gradual increase in average sample difficulty across batches, while samples inside a batch are randomly shuffled. Figure 6 demonstrates the effectiveness of our curriculum strategy, which stabilizes the training process and achieves higher accuracy.
items.zh: 为确保模型受到充分挑战，我们对数据进行预处理：使用LN-Super对每个问题独立生成8个回答，计算通过率，然后有意丢弃通过率≥0.75的提示，从而增加训练数据的难度。除了数据过滤，我们还发现课程训练有帮助，因为它允许模型从难度递增的任务序列中逐步学习。具体来说，我们利用预先计算的通过率作为难度指标，实施渐进式批处理策略。给定固定批次大小，我们方法的核心是动态计算每个连续批次的目标通过率分布。该分布使用高斯函数建模，其中心难度水平从初始批次的高通过率（较简单示例）逐渐过渡到后期批次的低通过率（较难示例）。样本主要根据此目标分布分配到每个批次，同时考虑每个通过率的可用数量，任何剩余的批次容量通过优先选择剩余样本池最大的通过率来填充。这确保了批次间平均样本难度的可控、渐进增加，而批次内的样本则随机打乱。图6展示了我们课程策略的有效性，它稳定了训练过程并实现了更高的准确率。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Ablation on curriculum vs non-curriculum.
items.capZh: 图6：课程与非课程的消融实验。

items.en: We primarily use NeMo-Aligner (Shen et al., 2024) to perform RL training, where we use a development branch that implements GRPO and heterogeneous model support. We implements the generation stage using vLLM (Kwon et al., 2023) and the training stage using Megatron-LM (Shoeybi et al., 2020). The training and inference stages are co-located on the same GPUs.
items.zh: 我们主要使用NeMo-Aligner（Shen等人，2024）进行强化学习训练，其中我们使用实现了GRPO和异构模型支持的一个开发分支。我们使用vLLM（Kwon等人，2023）实现生成阶段，使用Megatron-LM（Shoeybi等人，2020）实现训练阶段。训练和推理阶段位于同一组GPU上。

items.en: The total GPU count used was 72 nodes of 8xH100. The training model parallelism used was: tensor parallel=8 with sequence parallel, context parallel=2, pipeline parallel=18, and data parallel=2. The generation model parallelism was tensor parallel=8, and data parallel=72. The details of how this parallelization strategy is chosen is explained in 5.2.2. Generation was performed in FP8, and training in BF16 with FP32 optimizer states.
items.zh: 使用的总GPU数量为72个节点，每个节点8块H100。训练模型并行设置为：张量并行=8（带序列并行），上下文并行=2，流水线并行=18，数据并行=2。生成模型并行设置为：张量并行=8，数据并行=72。此并行化策略的选择细节在第5.2.2节中解释。生成采用FP8，训练采用BF16和FP32优化器状态。

items.en: Each stage maintains its own set of model weights, which are synced at the start of each step. First, all training weights are all-gathered over the training pipeline parallel dimension, converted into vLLM format, and written into shared memory. Then all training stage memory is released or offloaded to host. Next, vLLM is awoken from sleep mode, loads the newly saved model weights from shared memory, and begins generating. After generations have finished, vLLM GPU memory is released using sleep mode=2, and all training memory is reloaded.
items.zh: 每个阶段维护自己的一组模型权重，在每一步开始时同步。首先，所有训练权重在训练流水线并行维度上全规约，转换为vLLM格式，并写入共享内存。然后，所有训练阶段内存被释放或卸载到主机。接着，vLLM从睡眠模式唤醒，加载新保存的模型权重，并开始生成。生成完成后，使用睡眠模式=2释放vLLM GPU内存，并重新加载所有训练内存。

items.en: One of the major challenges in enabling the GRPO training of the LN-Ultra is memory management. The training jobs are scheduled to a shared cluster environment. In the cluster, each node has 8 H100 GPUs, dual socket 32-core CPUs, and 2TB CPU DRAM. On the other hand, the model in BF16 type takes 253×2≈500​G​B253\times 2\approx 500GB memory. Moreover, as mentioned in Section 5.2.1, in order to improve GPU utilization, we determine to stack training and inference stages on the same set of nodes. Without careful memory management, it is very easy to encounter out-of-memory errors in both GPU and CPU memory allocations.
items.zh: 启用LN-Ultra的GRPO训练的主要挑战之一是内存管理。训练作业被调度到共享集群环境。在集群中，每个节点有8块H100 GPU、双插槽32核CPU和2TB CPU DRAM。另一方面，BF16类型的模型占用253×2≈500GB内存。此外，如第5.2.1节所述，为了提高GPU利用率，我们决定将训练和推理阶段堆叠在同一组节点上。如果没有仔细的内存管理，很容易在GPU和CPU内存分配中遇到内存不足错误。

items.en: In order to better track the memory usage over the course of training, we have developed three simple memory profiling tools to monitor the memory usage: GPU memory utilization using PyTorch, CPU memory utilization using psutil, and /dev/shm utilization using the df command. The GPU/CPU memory profilers help us track the GPU/CPU memory usage at different code pointers. The /dev/shm profiler is needed as we use /dev/shm to pass the weights from the trainer to the vLLM server, and the host is configured to allocate up to 1TB for the /dev/shm space.
items.zh: 为了更好地跟踪训练过程中的内存使用情况，我们开发了三个简单的内存分析工具来监控内存使用：使用PyTorch监控GPU内存使用，使用psutil监控CPU内存使用，以及使用df命令监控/dev/shm使用。GPU/CPU内存分析器帮助我们在不同代码点跟踪GPU/CPU内存使用。/dev/shm分析器是必需的，因为我们使用/dev/shm将权重从训练器传递给vLLM服务器，并且主机配置为分配高达1TB的/dev/shm空间。

items.en: With the help of these profiling tools, we are able to pinpoint the specific memory allocations that cause out-of-memory errors, and then design solutions to overcome the issues. The first challenge is weight preparation. When we all-gather training weights across pipeline parallel stages, we have encountered extremely big tensors due to the heterogeneous architecture. One of the tensors has 13B elements, and occupies 26B GPU memory in the BF16 type. We need to release unused GPU memory periodically, and move some of the tensor conversion operations to CPU in order to control the GPU memory usage in this stage. The second challenge is the vLLM GPU memory utilization. With tensor parallel equal to 8, we expect each GPU to keep 500/8≈62​G​B500/8\approx 62GB from the weights in BF16. Considering KV cache, activations, and GPU memory occupied by the trainer, we have a very tight budget for the vLLM. We have to disable the cudagraph feature to avoid GPU out-of-memory in vLLM. However, when we enable FP8 inference generation as explained in 5.2.3, GPU memory budget becomes a lot looser, and we get to enable the cudagraph feature again. The final challenge is the GPU and CPU memory usage in the trainer. Tensor parallelism = 8 is a natural choice to partition the full model into the 8xH100 GPUs available in the same node. As the model architecture is heterogeneous, we need to insert identity layers in order to balance the pipeline stages in the pipeline parallelism. We want to have enough pipeline parallelism to avoid training OOM in GPU and checkpoint saving OOM in CPU. On the other hand, we also want to reduce the number of pipeline stages to reduce the communication costs. With all of the trade-offs, we find that the best pipeline parallelism setting is 18. The activations also consume a lot of memory, and we need to keep 18 micro-batches in the case when pipeline parallelism is 18. We end up using context parallel = 2 and sequence parallel to reduce the activation memory consumption to prevent GPU OOM in training. With all these tuning, we finally choose tensor parallel=8 with sequence parallel, context parallel=2, pipeline parallel=18, and data parallel=2 to achieve >90%>90\% utilization of the GPUs while avoiding any hosts from encountering GPU or CPU out-of-memory errors.
items.zh: 借助这些分析工具，我们能够精确定位导致内存不足错误的具体内存分配，然后设计解决方案来克服这些问题。第一个挑战是权重准备。当我们在流水线并行阶段之间全规约训练权重时，由于异构架构，我们遇到了极大的张量。其中一个张量有130亿个元素，在BF16类型下占用26GB GPU内存。我们需要定期释放未使用的GPU内存，并将一些张量转换操作移到CPU，以控制此阶段的GPU内存使用。第二个挑战是vLLM GPU内存利用。张量并行等于8时，我们期望每个GPU从BF16权重中保留500/8≈62GB。考虑到KV缓存、激活和训练器占用的GPU内存，vLLM的预算非常紧张。我们不得不禁用cudagraph功能以避免vLLM中的GPU内存不足。然而，当我们启用第5.2.3节中解释的FP8推理生成时，GPU内存预算变得宽松得多，我们得以再次启用cudagraph功能。最后一个挑战是训练器中的GPU和CPU内存使用。张量并行=8是将完整模型划分到同一节点上的8块H100 GPU的自然选择。由于模型架构是异构的，我们需要插入恒等层以平衡流水线并行中的流水线阶段。我们希望有足够的流水线并行以避免训练GPU内存不足和检查点保存CPU内存不足。另一方面，我们也希望减少流水线阶段数量以减少通信成本。综合考虑所有权衡，我们发现最佳的流水线并行设置为18。激活也消耗大量内存，在流水线并行为18的情况下，我们需要保持18个微批次。我们最终使用上下文并行=2和序列并行来减少激活内存消耗，以防止训练中GPU内存不足。经过所有这些调整，我们最终选择张量并行=8（带序列并行）、上下文并行=2、流水线并行=18和数据并行=2，以实现>90%的GPU利用率，同时避免任何主机遇到GPU或CPU内存不足错误。

items.en: We identify the generation stage as the dominant component of the step time. In order to improve performance, we implement a path to support the use of vLLM’s online FP8 generation mode, which executes all GEMMs in FP8 using per token activation scaling factors and per tensor weight scaling factors. We implement custom vLLM weight loaders capable of loading BF16 weights supplied by the training stage, and casting to FP8 weights and scaling factors at runtime. Because vLLM does not support directly initializing models in FP8, we also implement meta-weight tensor initialization to avoid materializing the full BF16 inference engine, which would cause an out-of-memory error in the GPU.
items.zh: 我们确定生成阶段是步骤时间的主要组成部分。为了提高性能，我们实现了一条路径来支持使用vLLM的在线FP8生成模式，该模式使用每token激活缩放因子和每张量权重缩放因子以FP8执行所有GEMM。我们实现了自定义vLLM权重加载器，能够加载训练阶段提供的BF16权重，并在运行时转换为FP8权重和缩放因子。由于vLLM不支持直接以FP8初始化模型，我们还实现了元权重张量初始化，以避免实例化完整的BF16推理引擎，否则会导致GPU内存不足错误。

items.en: In all, we observe a peak FP8 generation throughput of 32 tokens/s/GPU/prompt, a 1.8x generation speedup against BF16, and to our knowledge the highest decoding throughput observed in reasoning training at this scale. We observe a 1.4x speedup from FP8 generation alone, and an additional 0.4x from the reduction in memory usage, which allows us to enable vLLM’s cudagraph feature.
items.zh: 总体而言，我们观察到峰值FP8生成吞吐量为32 tokens/s/GPU/prompt，相比BF16有1.8倍的生成加速，据我们所知，这是此规模推理训练中观察到的最高解码吞吐量。我们观察到FP8生成单独带来1.4倍加速，另外0.4倍来自内存使用的减少，这使我们能够启用vLLM的cudagraph功能。

items.en: After training for scientific reasoning, we do a short RL run optimizing instruction following capabilities for the LN-Super and LN-Ultra. We use a similar verification setup as Zhou et al. (2023), and generate synthetic instruction following prompts that contain from one to ten detailed instructions. We run RL with the RLOO algorithm (Ahmadian et al., 2024) for less than 120 steps using our instruction following verifier as a reward, with a batch size of 128 prompts. We find such training boosts performance on conventional instruction following benchmarks as well as reasoning benchmarks.
items.zh: 在科学推理训练之后，我们对LN-Super和LN-Ultra进行了一次简短的强化学习运行，以优化指令遵循能力。我们使用与Zhou等人（2023）类似的验证设置，并生成包含一到十条详细指令的合成指令遵循提示。我们使用RLOO算法（Ahmadian等人，2024）运行强化学习，步数少于120步，使用我们的指令遵循验证器作为奖励，批次大小为128个提示。我们发现这种训练提高了常规指令遵循基准以及推理基准的性能。

full.secZh: 6.2 基于人类反馈的强化学习

items.en: We use RLHF to improve the model on general helpfulness and chat capabilities while carefully maintaining its proficiency in other areas. As shown in Table 4, LN-Super, a 49B model, achieves an Arena Hard score of 88.3, beating proprietary models such as Claude 3.5 Sonnet and GPT-4o-2024-05-13 as well as much larger open models such as Llama-3.1-405b-instruct and Mistral-large-2407.
items.zh: 我们使用基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）来改进模型在通用帮助性和聊天能力方面的表现，同时谨慎保持其在其他领域的熟练度。如表4所示，LN-Super（一个490亿参数模型）在Arena Hard上取得了88.3分，击败了Claude 3.5 Sonnet和GPT-4o-2024-05-13等专有模型，以及Llama-3.1-405b-instruct和Mistral-large-2407等更大的开源模型。

items.en: To achieve this, we use iterative online RPO (NVIDIA, 2024c; Sun et al., 2025) to maximize the reward predicted by Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B-Reward (NVIDIA, 2024b) over prompts from HelpSteer2 (Wang et al., 2025a). For each iteration, we use a learning rate α\alpha of 4e-7, KL penalty β\beta of 1e-5, reward scale η\eta of 3.0, and batch size of 64, training for 500 steps. Two iterations of online RPO increase the Arena Hard score from 69.1 to 88.1. More interestingly, this process also improves the model’s performance on all other adopted benchmarks except IFEval. Since neither the dataset nor the reward model is optimized for math, coding, science, or function calling, we speculate that RLHF helps the model better utilize its existing knowledge and skills.
items.zh: 为了实现这一点，我们使用迭代在线RPO（NVIDIA, 2024c; Sun等人，2025）来最大化Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B-Reward（NVIDIA, 2024b）在HelpSteer2（Wang等人，2025a）提示上预测的奖励。每次迭代，我们使用学习率α=4e-7，KL惩罚β=1e-5，奖励缩放η=3.0，批次大小为64，训练500步。两轮在线RPO将Arena Hard分数从69.1提高到88.1。更有趣的是，这个过程也提高了模型在所有其他采用基准上的性能，除了IFEval。由于数据集和奖励模型都不是针对数学、编程、科学或函数调用优化的，我们推测基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）帮助模型更好地利用其现有知识和技能。

items.en: We follow the same process for LN-Ultra, except that GRPO is employed. For each prompt, we sample 8 responses. We train the model for 30 steps, using a learning rate of 3e-7, batch size of 288, and KL penalty β\beta of 1e-3.
items.zh: 我们对LN-Ultra遵循相同的过程，只是采用了GRPO。对于每个提示，我们采样8个回答。我们训练模型30步，使用学习率3e-7，批次大小288，KL惩罚β=1e-3。

items.en: For LN-Nano, we conduct two rounds of offline RPO with on-policy data. We use a mixture of reasoning and non-reasoning data with appropriate system prompts in the first round of RPO to improve reasoning control, followed by a second round with on-policy generations targeting instruction following improvements. For each RPO round we train up to 400 steps with a learning rate α\alpha of 7e-7, KL penalty β\beta of 3e-2, and batch size of 512.
items.zh: 对于LN-Nano，我们使用在线策略数据进行了两轮离线RPO。在第一轮RPO中，我们混合使用推理和非推理数据以及适当的系统提示，以改进推理控制，随后进行第二轮，使用在线策略生成，针对指令遵循改进。每轮RPO我们训练最多400步，学习率α=7e-7，KL惩罚β=3e-2，批次大小512。

items.en: We evaluate all Llama-Nemotron models across two benchmark categories: reasoning and non-reasoning.
items.zh: 我们在两个基准类别上评估所有Llama-Nemotron模型：推理和非推理。

items.en: Reasoning Benchmarks. These include the American Invitational Mathematics Examination for years 2024 (AIME24) and 2025(AIME25), GPQA-Diamond (Rein et al., 2024), LiveCodeBench (Jain et al., 2024), and MATH500 (Lightman et al., 2023). AIME25 is split into two parts: AIME25-I and AIME25-II, each containing 15 problems. For LN-Nano, we use AIME25-I only; for LN-Super and LN-Ultra, we evaluate on the full 30-question set. As AIME25 was released recently, it is less likely to overlap with training data. Thus, stronger performance on this benchmark is indicative of better generalization, especially on math problems outside the training distribution. LiveCodeBench contains questions indexed by date, and we report results on two specific ranges—(2408–2502) and (2410–2502)—to enable fair comparison with previously reported baselines.
items.zh: 推理基准测试。这些包括2024年和2025年的美国邀请数学考试（AIME24和AIME25）、GPQA-Diamond（Rein等人，2024）、LiveCodeBench（Jain等人，2024）和MATH500（Lightman等人，2023）。AIME25分为两部分：AIME25-I和AIME25-II，每部分包含15道题。对于LN-Nano，我们仅使用AIME25-I；对于LN-Super和LN-Ultra，我们在完整的30道题集上进行评估。由于AIME25最近才发布，它与训练数据重叠的可能性较小。因此，在该基准测试上更强的性能表明更好的泛化能力，尤其是在训练分布之外的数学问题上。LiveCodeBench包含按日期索引的问题，我们报告两个特定范围——(2408–2502)和(2410–2502)——的结果，以便与先前报告的基线进行公平比较。

items.en: Non-Reasoning Benchmarks. These include IFEval(Strict-Instruction) (Zhou et al., 2023) for instruction following, BFCL V2 Live (Yan et al., 2024) for tool use via function calling, and Arena-Hard (Li et al., 2024) for evaluating alignment with human conversational preferences.
items.zh: 非推理基准测试。这些包括用于指令遵循的IFEval(Strict-Instruction)（Zhou等人，2023）、用于通过函数调用进行工具使用的BFCL V2 Live（Yan等人，2024），以及用于评估与人类对话偏好对齐的Arena-Hard（Li等人，2024）。

items.en: All evaluations are conducted at 32k context length, even though training was performed with a maximum context length of 16k for LN-Super and 24k for LN-Ultra. We observed consistent improvements when evaluating at expanded context lengths, as shorter limits can truncate long reasoning traces and lead to incomplete generations—particularly on benchmarks that require multi-step reasoning. We use temperature 0.6 and top-p 0.95 for reasoning-on evaluations, and temperature 0 (greedy decoding) for reasoning-off. We generate up to 16 completions per prompt and report average pass@1 accuracy. Checkpoints are selected based on performance on a subset of reasoning benchmarks. As observed in prior works (Moshkov et al., 2025), evaluation on reasoning-heavy tasks such as AIME can exhibit high variance due to small dataset size and generation randomness. Reported numbers may vary across repeated runs or sampling strategies.
items.zh: 所有评估均在32k上下文长度下进行，尽管LN-Super的最大训练上下文长度为16k，LN-Ultra为24k。我们观察到，在扩展的上下文长度下评估时，性能持续提升，因为较短的上下文限制可能会截断长推理轨迹并导致生成不完整——尤其是在需要多步推理的基准测试上。对于推理开启的评估，我们使用温度0.6和top-p 0.95；对于推理关闭的评估，使用温度0（贪心解码）。我们为每个提示生成最多16个补全，并报告平均pass@1准确率。检查点根据推理基准测试子集上的性能进行选择。如先前工作（Moshkov等人，2025）所观察到的，在AIME等推理密集型任务上的评估可能因数据集规模小和生成随机性而表现出高方差。报告的数字可能因重复运行或采样策略而异。

items.en: From Table 5, we observe that the LN-Ultra-SFT model approaches the performance of DeepSeek-R1 on several reasoning benchmarks, including GPQA and AIME. However, the RL stage is critical for surpassing DeepSeek-R1, particularly on GPQA. This highlights the complementary strengths of SFT and RL: SFT builds a strong foundation by distilling reasoning behavior from teacher models, while RL is essential for surpassing teacher performance and further enhancing reasoning capabilities.
items.zh: 从表5中，我们观察到LN-Ultra-SFT模型在多个推理基准测试（包括GPQA和AIME）上接近DeepSeek-R1的性能。然而，RL阶段对于超越DeepSeek-R1至关重要，尤其是在GPQA上。这凸显了SFT和RL的互补优势：SFT通过从教师模型蒸馏推理行为来构建坚实基础，而RL对于超越教师性能并进一步增强推理能力至关重要。

items.en: We also find that there is a trade-off between the extent of SFT training and the success likelihood of subsequent RL. Although we had access to SFT checkpoints with higher benchmark scores, we initialized RL from an earlier checkpoint to improve final RL outcomes.
items.zh: 我们还发现，SFT训练的程度与后续RL的成功可能性之间存在权衡。尽管我们可以访问具有更高基准测试分数的SFT检查点，但我们从较早的检查点初始化RL以改善最终的RL结果。

items.en: In addition to reasoning and chat capabilities where the models are trained for, we evaluate our models on an out-of-distribution task, LLM-as-a-Judge, to further assess their performance. Specifically, we test them on JudgeBench (Tan et al., 2025), where the task is to differentiate between high-quality and low-quality responses. As shown in Table 6, our models outperform top proprietary and open-source models. Notably, LN-Ultra emerges as the best open-source model, significantly surpassing DeepSeek-R1 and trailing only behind o3-mini(high). Furthermore, LN-Super also outperforms o1-mini, demonstrating that our models exhibit strong generalization capabilities across diverse tasks.
items.zh: 除了模型训练的推理和聊天能力外，我们还在分布外任务LLM-as-a-Judge上评估模型，以进一步评估其性能。具体来说，我们在JudgeBench（Tan等人，2025）上进行测试，该任务要求区分高质量和低质量的回答。如表6所示，我们的模型优于顶级专有和开源模型。值得注意的是，LN-Ultra成为最佳开源模型，显著超越DeepSeek-R1，仅次于o3-mini(high)。此外，LN-Super也优于o1-mini，表明我们的模型在多样化任务上表现出强大的泛化能力。

items.en: We present the Llama-Nemotron series of models. The models are released under a permissive license and we open-source the weights, training data, and code. The Llama-Nemotron series of models perform competitively with state-of-the-art reasoning models, while having low memory requirements and efficient inference capabilities.
items.zh: 我们介绍了Llama-Nemotron系列模型。这些模型在宽松许可下发布，我们开源了权重、训练数据和代码。Llama-Nemotron系列模型与最先进的推理模型竞争，同时具有低内存需求和高效推理能力。

items.en: We find that in the presence of a strong reasoning teacher, supervised fine-tuning on high-quality synthetic data generated by such teacher is very effective in adding reasoning capabilities to smaller models. However, to push reasoning capabilities beyond what is possible from a teacher reasoning model alone, it is necessary to run large-scale, curriculum-driven reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards training.
items.zh: 我们发现，在存在强大推理教师的情况下，对该教师生成的高质量合成数据进行监督微调，对于为较小模型添加推理能力非常有效。然而，要将推理能力推至超越教师推理模型本身所能达到的水平，有必要运行大规模、课程驱动的基于可验证奖励的强化学习。

items.en: We also show that to produce a great all-around model, e.g. a model which performs well on a wide variety of benchmarks, it is necessary to have several stages in the post-training pipeline.
items.zh: 我们还表明，要生成一个全面的优秀模型，例如在广泛基准测试上表现良好的模型，后训练流程中需要多个阶段。

items.zh: 我们感谢以下人员对Llama-Nemotron项目的宝贵贡献。
